title: Aegis-Node `aegis validate` JSON output (per-record)
description: Per F10-B / ADR-012 / issue #60. The JSON output of `aegis validate --format=json` is newline-delimited JSON: one object per line, conforming to this schema. Order is stable across runs (sorted by file, field, rule_id) so consumers can diff outputs.

file.description: Path to the manifest the finding refers to. Omitted when `aegis validate` reads from stdin.

severity.description: Effective severity after applying any per-rule overrides from .aegis-validate.yaml.

message.description: One-line description of the specific instance of the rule violation (includes the offending value).

rationale.description: Longer explanation of why the rule exists. Stable across instances of the same rule; safe to dedupe in dashboards.
